evidence_summary: Establish the scale disparity between a giant Alice and the small White Rabbit through frantic movement and sudden interruption.

The White Rabbit scurries into the hall, preoccupied with his errands for the Duchess. Alice attempts to engage him, but her massive size startles him so much that he drops his gloves and fan before fleeing into the darkness. Alice retrieves the dropped items.
The White Rabbit scurries through the hall, preoccupied with his errands.
Alice retrieves the dropped gloves and fan from the floor.
A frantic errand-run turns into a startled flight when the Rabbit encounters a giant girl.
